sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_arrays (id UInt32, values Array(Int32));
SELECT id, arrayPartialReverseSort(3, values) AS sorted_values FROM test_arrays;
UPDATE test_arrays SET values = arrayPartialReverseSort(2, values) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, arrayPartialReverseSort(4, values) FROM test_arrays WHERE id = 2;
